productDisplayName: Converse Unisex Plaid Check Ox Red Shoes
description: These plaid shoes from converse showcase vintage check style in a contemporary design. Cut low at the ankle for optimal breathability, this shoe simply must grace your shoe collection. women can wear this with skinny jeans, a dressy top or a bright tee and a vest to combine glam and sport, Kristen Stewart style. men can wear this with washed denims, and a bright tee with a checked scarf.UpperCheck patterned fabric upper with metal eyelets at the midfoot area for breathabilityCentral lacing systemCheck patterned collarPU overlay at the toe boxMidsolePU foxing and PU midsoleOutsoleTerraced grooves and waffle patterns on the outsole for enhanced grip
